final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster for "大话西游" reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style, featuring Zhizunbao and Zixia embracing and kissing against a city wall, with the Bull Demon King and Tang Seng standing in the distance.

Style/medium: 1990s Hong Kong film poster, film grain, analog photography aesthetic
Composition: foreground couple (至尊宝 and 紫霞) in close embrace and kiss against a weathered city wall, mid-to-far background figures of 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing apart, cinematic wide framing
Subject: 至尊宝 and 紫霞 kissing against a city wall in the foreground; 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing silently in the far background
Scene/backdrop: ancient city wall, dusk or night atmosphere evoking 90s HK wuxia-fantasy mood
Lighting/mood: warm amber and deep shadow contrast, melancholic and romantic, 90s Hong Kong film noir-fantasy tone
Color palette: faded warm amber, dusty rose, deep shadow blacks — desaturated with analog color shift
Materials/textures: heavy film grain overlay, slight halation on highlights, worn poster print texture
Text (verbatim): 大话西游
Constraints: must read as a period-accurate 1990s Hong Kong movie poster; film grain must be visible and prominent
Avoid: modern CGI gloss, clean digital look, oversaturated colors, Western fantasy poster style
